payload.title: Metro-North Railroad Finance Report
payload.description: Monthly Financial Report providing year-to-date fiscal information comparing actual revenues, expenses and staffing levels to the Mid-Year Forecast for Metro-North Railroad, July 2022.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Metro-North Railroad's Monthly Financial Report provides year-to-date fiscal information comparing actual revenues, expenses and staffing levels to the Mid-Year Forecast (Forecast) and key financial performance indicators.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
